traits.name: Spectral Dagger (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest) (bonus)
traits.text: The choldrith conjures a floating, spectral dagger within 60 feet of itself. The choldrith can make a melee spell attack (4 to hit) against one creature within 5 feet of the dagger. On a hit, the target takes 6 (1d8 + 2) force damage. The dagger lasts for 1 minute. As a bonus action on later turns, the choldrith can move the dagger up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against one creature within 5 feet of the dagger.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.text: The choldrith has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the choldrith to sleep.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The choldrith can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Sense
traits.text: While in contact with a web, the choldrith knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

traits.name: Web Walker
traits.text: The choldrith ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.
